arts.ttl: Brighton's Premier League rivals to appoint new manager – clear favourite emerges amid Graham Potter decision
arts.sum: All the latest news for Brighton and across the Premier League

arts.ttl: Southampton troll fierce rivals Portsmouth as game called off due to power failure
arts.sum: Portsmouth were forced to call off their Championship fixture with Millwall due to a power failure at Fratton Park - and they were subsequently mocked by their arch-rivals on social media
